Episodes.Title: An Unearthly Child
Episodes.Writer: Anthony Coburn, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Two schoolteachers investigate the personal life of one of their brilliant students and her mysterious grandfather.

Episodes.Title: The Cave of Skulls
Episodes.Writer: Anthony Coburn, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS takes its new passengers back to the dawn of history. There, the Doctor and his party are captured by a tribe who are trying to rediscover the secret of fire.

Episodes.Title: The Forest of Fear
Episodes.Writer: Anthony Coburn, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Old Mother frees the Doctor and the others on condition they will leave the tribe and not make fire.The group attempt to return to the TARDIS but Za and Hur follow them.

Episodes.Title: The Firemaker
Episodes.Writer: Anthony Coburn, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Kal accuses Za of Old Mother's murder but the Doctor exposes him as the real killer.However, Za then insists the travellers be held prisoner until they show him how to make fire.

Episodes.Title: The Dead Planet
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands in a petrified forest on an alien planet. Determined to explore, the Doctor leads his companions into the metal city, where they discover the danger of what will become his deadliest enemies, the mutant Daleks. (O...

Episodes.Title: The Survivors
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Susan and Ian search the city for Barbara and learn that the area is contaminated with radiation.Then they encounter the Daleks.

Episodes.Title: The Escape
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Susan meets Alydon of the Thals and agrees to try and arrange a treaty between his people and the Daleks. But the Daleks only see it as an opportunity to wipe the Thals out.

Episodes.Title: The Ambush
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends attempt to escape from the Dalek City. However, knowing that the Thals are walking into a trap, Ian decides to go and warn them.

Episodes.Title: The Expedition
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends realise that their only chance of recovering the fluid link is to persuade the Thals to fight back against the Daleks.

Episodes.Title: The Ordeal
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While Ian, Barbara and their Thal friends try to find a way into the Dalek City through the mountains, the Doctor, Susan and Alydon attempt to make their own way in.

Episodes.Title: The Rescue
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, David Whitaker, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian, Barbara and the surviving members of their party try to find a way into the Dalek City whilst Alydon prepares the other Thals for an attack. But only the Doctor and Susan are aware of the full extent of the threat the Daleks ...

Episodes.Title: The Edge of Destruction
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: In this completely TARDIS-based story, the crew find themselves and their ship acting very strangely indeed. Blame runs high for the Ship's unusual behavior, until the Doctor realizes the TARDIS itself may be trying to warn them.....

Episodes.Title: The Brink of Disaster
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor becomes increasingly suspicious of Ian and Barbara but when the occurrences aboard the TARDIS become even stranger he realises they are in even greater danger than they realised.

Episodes.Title: The Roof of the World
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS arrives on Earth in the 13th century, where it is claimed by famed explorer Marco Polo as a gift for his employer, Kublai Khan. Polo hopes to finally buy his way out of the Khan's service - but if he succeeds, the Docto...

Episodes.Title: The Singing Sands
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Tegana sabotages the party's water bags, leaving them in dire need of fresh supplies.

Episodes.Title: Five Hundred Eyes
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Susan are able to supply Marco with condensation that has formed inside the TARDIS, saving the group from dying of thirst.When the group are reunited with Tegana, the travelers begin to suspect he is up to something.

Episodes.Title: The Wall of Lies
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor's group manage to rescue Barbara from the Mongols but once more Marco remains unaware of Tegana's involvement.

Episodes.Title: Rider from Shang-Tu
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends elect to warn Marco of Acomat's attack even though it means losing their chance to gain access to the TARDIS.

Episodes.Title: Mighty Kublai Khan
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Ian and Barbara are forced to surrender to Tegana and Marco, leaving both of them the opportunity to gain possession of the TARDIS.

Episodes.Title: Assassin at Peking
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Tegana finally makes his move to assassinate the Khan, giving the Doctor and his friends an opportunity to thwart his plans and regain the TARDIS.

Episodes.Title: The Sea of Death
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: On the planet Marinus, the Doctor and his companions are enlisted by Arbitan to seek out the keys to an ancient and powerful machine. Their quest takes them across time and space; will they be able to return the keys before Marinu...

Episodes.Title: The Velvet Web
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends arrive in the apparently idyllic city of Morphoton but Barbara soon begins to realise there is more to their hosts than meets the eye.

Episodes.Title: The Screaming Jungle
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The search for the second key takes the travellers to a jungle where Ian and Barbara come under threat from rapidly growing plants.

Episodes.Title: The Snows of Terror
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Searching for the third key, Ian and Barbara meet with the sinister trapper Vasor before following Susan and the others into a cave system guarded by the mysterious Ice Soldiers.

Episodes.Title: Sentence of Death
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The group are reunited with the Doctor in the city of Millennius where Ian faces trial for murder after the fourth key is stolen.

Episodes.Title: The Keys of Marinus
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends must locate the real murderers and the fourth key before heading off for a final confrontation with the Voord.

Episodes.Title: The Temple of Evil
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS arrives on Earth landing in 16th century Aztec society. Barbara goes off exploring - despite the Doctor's orders not to wander off - and is taken away by the high priest Autloc who believes she is the reincarnation of t...

Episodes.Title: The Warriors of Death
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Barbara tries to change the course of history - and Ian fights for his life.

Episodes.Title: The Bride of Sacrifice
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While the Doctor tries to find a way back to the TARDIS, Tlotoxl continues to plot Barbara's downfall and sees an opening when Susan questions Aztec custom.

Episodes.Title: The Day of Darkness
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Tlotoxl's machinations result in both Susan and Ian being arrested.With the TARDIS once again trapped inside the tomb, the travelers' only hope for escape lies with Autloc and Cameca.

Episodes.Title: Strangers in Space
Episodes.Writer: Peter R. Newman, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS arrives aboard a spaceship that has been captured by the Sensorites, a hearing-sensitive alien race. The Sensorites are dying, and the Doctor finds himself forced to investigate the origin of the mysterious illness. (Or...

Episodes.Title: The Unwilling Warriors
Episodes.Writer: Peter R. Newman, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The ship has been boarded by the Sensorites and the race is on to retrieve Susan and Barbara before they can find them.

Episodes.Title: Hidden Danger
Episodes.Writer: Peter R. Newman, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Susan and Ian agree to accompany the Sensorites to their home planet in the hope of finding a cure for John. But not everyone is willing to welcome them there.

Episodes.Title: A Race Against Death
Episodes.Writer: Peter R. Newman, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: With Ian having fallen victim to the Sensorites' plague, the Doctor is desperate to find a cure. But the City Administrator is still determined to rid his world of aliens.

Episodes.Title: Kidnap
Episodes.Writer: Peter R. Newman, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The City Administrator is determined to destroy the Doctor and his friends and his paranoia prevents the Doctor's cure from being distributed.

Episodes.Title: A Desperate Venture
Episodes.Writer: Peter R. Newman, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While the City Administrator's schemes reach their climax, the Doctor and Ian venture into the tunnels under the city to discover the real cause of the Sensorite plague.

Episodes.Title: A Land of Fear
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands during the French Revolution, where Ian, Barbara, and Susan become caught up in the politics of the day. When they are arrested and set to be executed, the Doctor must take on the disguise of a public official to ...

Episodes.Title: Guests of Madame Guillotine
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Susan, Ian and Barbara are sentenced to be guillotined but an encounter with a dying English prisoner may offer Ian a chance of survival.

Episodes.Title: A Change of Identity
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Susan and Barbara are rescued by Jules and Jean, two members of the escape chain, while the Doctor gains access to the prison by posing as a revolution official.

Episodes.Title: The Tyrant of France
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is forced into a meeting with Robespierre while Barbara's attempts to find a physician for Susan result in them being betrayed.

Episodes.Title: A Bargain of Necessity
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian finds himself held prisoner by the treacherous Leon while the Doctor attempts to engineer Susan and Barbara's escape.

Episodes.Title: Prisoners of Conciergerie
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian finally delivers his message to James Stirling but in order to secure Susan's release he and Barbara are forced into a dangerous spying mission.
